# init(withAAEncodedData:)

**Initializer**

Creates a new archive header from encoded data.

## Declaration

```swift
required init?(withAAEncodedData data: UnsafeBufferPointer<UInt8>)
```

## Parameters

- **data**: The encoded data.

## Creating an Extended Attributes Blob

- **init()**: Creates a new empty extended attribute blob.
- **init(directory:path:flags:)**: Creates a new extended attribute blob from the specified directory and path.

items.description: Creates a new empty extended attribute blob.
